title: Ted Noble
compiled_truth: Ted Noble is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-03-20 to 2001-11-30), Ted Noble sent 45 and received 173 emails, totalling 218 interactions. Top correspondents: [Susan Scott](people/susan-scott) (43), [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (2), [Ann Korioth](people/ann-korioth) (1), [Elsa Piekielniak](people/elsa-piekielniak) (1), [Patrick Conner](people/patrick-conner) (1).
